lyrics.v1: Unclean and battered, torn by sin, By things I do, my thoughts within, I lie there bloodied on life's road with death and sin my only load.
lyrics.v2: Across that road the world passed by turning a deaf ear to my cry, No help to give, they could not save and so they left me for my grave.
lyrics.v3: And, what of me, when I saw need? Did I my Savior's bidding heed? Too often on the other side I've walked away because of pride.
lyrics.v4: Sin bleeds from me and stops my breath, in Adam all I know is death; My works are rags, my offerings vain, From dust I came in dust remain.
lyrics.v5: But in my need my Savior died, Not passing on the other side. Rebreathed His Spirit in my dust, bound up my wounds, declared me just.
